outreach_draft.subject: Gatekeeper Liability Recovery — Uncollected Fraud Judgment — Seeking Counsel
outreach_draft.body:
Dear Mr. Rudman,

I am reaching out regarding a judgment monetization matter that may align with Robbins Geller's work in securities fraud and gatekeeper liability recovery.

Our client obtained a substantial default judgment against an offshore foreign corporation following adjudicated findings of fraud. The defendant has no reachable assets — direct enforcement is not viable. The recovery strategy focuses on gatekeeper liability: identifying auditors, underwriters, and other third-party gatekeepers whose professional failure enabled the fraud, and using that exposure to negotiate settlement.

Robbins Geller's record in auditor and underwriter gatekeeper actions — including the HP securities fraud appellate victory and multiple landmark class recoveries — suggests direct familiarity with this recovery model. I would welcome a brief preliminary conversation to understand whether this matter is the kind your firm would consider.

No commitment is implied at this stage. I am happy to provide additional case details under a mutual NDA if preferred.

Thank you for your time.

Sincerely,
[SENDER_NAME]
Corporate Z | Judgment Monetization Group
